summary: Iteration 18: Real-Time Data Pipeline E2E Testing - Complete verification of webhook→cache→SSE→frontend data flow. All 12 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend UI tests pass (100%). The real-time pipeline is fully functional: webhooks update cache instantly, SSE stream pushes data to frontend, and AnimaVM dashboard displays live data (Credits, Phase, Earned, Turns, LIVE indicator).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/webhook/agent-update correctly accepts data and returns {received: true}
GET /api/webhook/status shows last_update timestamp and update_source='webhook'

GET /api/live/stream (SSE) pushes complete payload including: engine state, conway_credits_cents, economics, phase, phase_state, total_earned_usd, total_spent_usd, revenue_actions, decision_count, wallet_address, sandbox_id, update_source, last_update, recent_revenue, recent_decisions, agent_stdout_tail
SSE instant push verified: data pushed within 2 seconds of webhook (not waiting for 5s heartbeat)
GET /api/live/financials returns cached data with correct totals (total_earned, total_spent calculated from revenue_log)
GET /api/live/activity returns merged decisions + revenue with _type field, sorted by timestamp
GET /api/live/heartbeat returns last_update and engine_running status
GET /api/live/turns returns decision entries from cache
GET /api/live/memory returns agent stdout as memory entries with type='stdout'
Frontend AnimaVM page displays SSE-driven data: Credits=$55.55, Phase=3, Earned=$123.45, Turns=1
LIVE indicator shows green text when SSE data has last_update
Phase badge displays correct phase label (Phase 3: Create Fund)
All 7 monitor tabs functional: Live Feed, Terminal, Exec Log, Agent Logs, Browsing, VMs, Message
Genesis screen: credits panel, tier buttons ($5/$25/$100), provisioning stepper (6 steps) all render correctly
Dashboard sidebar navigation: all 11 pages accessible
seed_data_creation: Test data pushed via webhook: economics.credits_cents=5555, phase_state.current_phase=3, revenue_log with gross_revenue=123.45
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified the complete real-time data pipeline. Webhook→cache→SSE→frontend flow is working correctly. Test data can be pushed via POST /api/webhook/agent-update with fields: economics, revenue_log, decisions_log, phase_state, agent_stdout, engine_running. SSE stream at /api/live/stream pushes data instantly on webhook arrival. Frontend AnimaVM page correctly displays all SSE-driven data including LIVE indicator.
backend_apis_tested: GET /api/live/financials - 200 OK (credits_usd, credits_cents, total_earned_usd, total_spent_usd, source=sandbox)
GET /api/live/soul - 200 OK (content with current_phase, exists=true, source=sandbox)

genesis_screen.provisioning_stepper: PASS - 6 steps: sandbox, terminal, openclaw, claudecode, skills, deploy

sse_pipeline_verification.event_signaling: PASS - asyncio.Event set()/clear() wakes SSE listeners
sse_pipeline_verification.instant_push: PASS - SSE pushed within 2s of webhook (not waiting for 5s heartbeat)
sse_pipeline_verification.payload_completeness: PASS - All required fields present in SSE payload
